title: Daniel Boone Thru the Wilderness
writer: Frank S. Mattison, Robert N. Bradbury
actors: Roy Stewart, Kathleen Collins, Edward Hearn
plot: In pre-revolutionary war days, Daniel Boone captures the white renegade Simon Gerty but lets him go. After Boone moves from North Carolina to homestead in Kentucky, Gerty reappears. This time Gerty kills the Chief's son saying it ...
